description: Add organization rename functionality and a post-Google-signup organization naming flow.
steps: Create backend/app/models/organization.py with OrganizationUpdate and OrganizationResponse models
Create backend/app/services/organization_service.py with get_organization and update_organization functions
Create backend/app/routers/organizations.py with PATCH and GET endpoints
Add needs_org_setup field to GoogleAuthResponse in backend/app/models/auth.py
Modify google_auth in backend/app/services/auth_service.py to return needs_org_setup flag
Modify google_auth endpoint in backend/app/routers/auth.py to return needs_org_setup
Create frontend/src/api/organizations.ts with getMyOrganization and updateOrganization
acceptance_criteria: Backend google_auth returns needs_org_setup: true for new users
Frontend builds successfully with all new pages and routes
AuthCallbackPage redirects to /organization-setup for new users
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/backend && python -c "from app.routers.organizations import router; print('Org router OK')"
findings: Backend Python imports all verified successfully. Frontend TypeScript build passes (1384 modules transformed). Used GoogleAuthResponse extending AuthResponse with needs_org_setup boolean. Organization router registered in main.py. AuthCallbackPage properly destructures needs_org_setup from typed response.
